title: Copy everything from Trello into Monday

posts.author: Wijcky (Kurt Wijckmans)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We are migrating our company from Trello to Monday. At this moment I’m able to copy a board from Trello to Monday, but it seems it’s not possible to also copy the activity/checklists/… on a topic.

This is crucial for us not to lose all this data.

Is there a way / work-around to get this done? Or do I have to add all this manually?

Thanks for your support

Have a nice day,

Kurt

PS : If this is in the wrong sections, please apologise. Very new to this Monday community

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Wijcky!

I am afraid it isn’t currently possible to import - Description, Checklists, Activities or Files - into the platform natively… I apologise for the setback!

In order to achieve this I’d advise looking into 3rd party solutions - you’re welcome to check out our external integration with Zapier too! I’ll leave some links below incase it helps:

  • Add new Trello cards to boards in monday.com
  • https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/115005934989-How-to-create-an-integration-using-Zapier

I hope this helps in some way!

posts.author: BeeHappy (Ben )
posts.cookedHtml: While directly copying activity and checklists might not be built-in, there’s a workaround you could consider. You could try migrate from trello to planfix data first – export the board with all its activity and checklist details. Then, import that exported data into Monday. It might require a few extra steps, but it could save you from manually adding everything. And don’t worry, you’re not alone in this. Many of us have faced similar challenges when switching platforms. Remember, it might take a bit of time, but once you’re settled, you’ll enjoy the benefits.

posts.author: inspiredearth (Jonathan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bianca Taylor:

Add new Trello cards to boards in monday.com

I realise this was nearly two years ago. I would appreciate a little clarification:
Are you saying one can set up a free (or trial) account on Planfix; import Trello board with all its data into their; then export all that data into one or more Excel sheets (or?); and then import that into Monday CRM?

Also, now in May 2025, are there any other / better solutions?

posts.author: Valeriaenriquezp (Valeria Enriquez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I wanted to check if there are any updates regarding the import of card information into Monday.

I attempted to use Zapier for this, but it doesn’t seem to be working correctly.

Is there a better way to accomplish this? Thank you!
